ddls:
CREATE TABLE "digital_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each digital circuit component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the digital circuit component (e.g., Efuses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the digital circuit component */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the component */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_data" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration data */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the digital circuit component the data belongs to */,
  "manual_reference" INTEGER /* Manual reference for the configuration data */,
  "memory_address" INTEGER /* Memory address for the configuration data */,
  "register_name" INTEGER /* Name of the register for the configuration data */,
  "bit_position" INTEGER /* Bit position of the configuration data */,
  "signal_name" INTEGER /* Name of the signal for the configuration data */,
  "function" INTEGER /* Function of the configuration data */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration data */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the configuration data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the configuration data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the configuration data */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the configuration data is active */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the configuration data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_data_signal_name FOREIGN KEY ("signal_name") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_data_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES digital_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_data_memory_address FOREIGN KEY ("memory_address") REFERENCES memory_addresses ("memory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_data_function FOREIGN KEY ("function") REFERENCES functions ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_data_register_name FOREIGN KEY ("register_name") REFERENCES registers ("register_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_data_manual_reference FOREIGN KEY ("manual_reference") REFERENCES manual_references ("manual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manual_references" (
  "manual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manual reference */,
  "manual_reference" TEXT /* Manual reference for the configuration data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the manual reference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the manual reference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the manual reference */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the manual reference */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the manual reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "memory_addresses" (
  "memory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each memory address */,
  "memory_address" INTEGER /* Memory address for the configuration data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the memory address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the memory address was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the memory address */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the memory address */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the memory address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("memory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registers" (
  "register_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each register name */,
  "register_name" TEXT /* Name of the register for the configuration data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the register name */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the register was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the register */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the register */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the register */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("register_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal name */,
  "signal_name" TEXT /* Name of the signal for the configuration data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the signal name */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the signal was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the signal */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the signal */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the signal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Function of the configuration data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the function */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the function was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the function */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the function */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, designer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the configuration data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES config_data ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration data being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the configuration data */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration data was changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the version is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_versions_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES config_data ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration data being reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., usage, change history) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_reports_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES config_data ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration data being imported */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration data was imported */,
  "import_format" TEXT /* Format of the imported data (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who imported the data */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the import was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_imports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_imports_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES config_data ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration data being exported */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration data was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who exported the data */,
  "export_status" TEXT /* Status of the export (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the export was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_exports_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES config_data ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_exports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
